source.name: Cohort-specific verified sources
source.license: Source-specific terms recorded on each cohort
source.attribution: Ratings and analysis are independent of the data providers.
source.scope: Complete declared men's and women's tournaments and league seasons only; each cohort records its included competitions, source, and snapshot hash.

methodology.lineup_trueskill: Sequential additive team-skill update using normalized minutes-played weights; every probability is recorded before its match update.
methodology.rapm: Match-level goal-difference ridge regression using normalized minutes weights, home-goal intercept, and a chronological final-quarter penalty selection.
methodology.pairwise_chemistry: Experimental non-additive residual model: exact teammate overlap minutes define pair features, ridge shrinkage is selected on the chronological final quarter, and effects are fitted only to goal difference left unexplained by RAPM.
methodology.lapm: Experimental team-specific line-graph APM adaptation: singleton players, qualifying pairs, and full observed constant lineups are graph nodes; non-zero Jaccard overlap creates edges and a Laplacian penalty smooths similar combinations toward one another.
methodology.interpretation: These estimates describe association with team outcomes within one declared complete tournament or season. They do not identify how a player contributed and should not be compared across cohorts.

cohorts.name: Premier League 2015/16
cohorts.scope_note: Complete 380-match league season. FA Cup, EFL Cup and UEFA fixtures are withheld because the open source does not provide complete lineup-minute coverage for those competitions.

parameters.home_advantage_evidence: Declared home team for league seasons; stadium country equals home-team country for international tournaments.

parameters.team_pair_normalization: Each side contributes one unit of total pair exposure per match, divided according to exact shared-pitch time.

parameters.jaccard_graph: All retained generalized-lineup nodes with non-zero player overlap are connected.
parameters.outcome: goal difference per 90 during constant-lineup stints
parameters.objective: weighted data fit + lambda × sum(Jaccard × squared node-value difference) + ridge anchor

cohorts.name: FA Women's Super League 2023/24
cohorts.scope_note: Complete 132-match league season. FA Cup, League Cup and UEFA fixtures are not included because equivalent complete lineup-minute coverage is unavailable in the open source.

parameters.home_advantage_evidence: Declared home team for league seasons; stadium country equals home-team country for international tournaments.

parameters.team_pair_normalization: Each side contributes one unit of total pair exposure per match, divided according to exact shared-pitch time.

parameters.jaccard_graph: All retained generalized-lineup nodes with non-zero player overlap are connected.
parameters.outcome: goal difference per 90 during constant-lineup stints
parameters.objective: weighted data fit + lambda × sum(Jaccard × squared node-value difference) + ridge anchor
